programme.title: The Sex Clinic
programme.desc: A male stripper comes in to get a rash looked at, and Emily requests an STI test.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Big Boobs
programme.desc: Podcaster and body confidence advocate Jackie Adedeji meets women with big breasts to explore the growing issue living with larger breasts and the increased demand for reduction surgery.

programme.title: Hollywood: No Sex, Please
programme.desc: Exploring how Hollywood has evolved to reflect society's changing attitudes towards sex over the decades, from "Basic Instinct" and "Body Heat" to "Mad Men" and "Sex and the City.".

programme.title: Indigiqueer
programme.desc: Indigiqueer Sarain Fox examines the Past, Present and future of queerness for members of the indigenous 2SLGBTQ+ Community.

programme.title: David Bowie: Out of This World
programme.desc: Few artists marked the 20th century like David Bowie marked it. He was an astonishing and eclectic performer whose work brought a new dimension to the music scene and queer culture. Driven, fierce and always wanting to escape conformity, he was an outsider and was considered as a man from another planet.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: In 1995, Tanya was on a double date driving through the mountains; the boys hunt down an elk and leave the girls stranded in the Utah wilderness; 19-year-old Sam dates a much older army veteran with a dark past and an insatiable sexual appetite.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Javon Walton shares his experiences in the ring and on set while cooking baked ziti with his dad, DJ. Javon, DJ and the rest of the family sit down together and share a traditional family meal.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Jason Genao, his sister Crystal, and his mother Nellie cook a Dominican feast, making patelon and roasted chicken; together, the threesome shares the secret to their loving, albeit dysfunctional family dynamic.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Amara La Negra and her mother, Ana Maria, get down in Miami to cook up some Dominican mangu; this staple from the DR comes with stories from Amara's childhood when she flourished at an early age with the help and sacrifice from her mom.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: It's the Queen's birthday and parole ain't stopping this diva from celebrating with family, friends and getting lit; chef Freedia hits the streets to better her community with her famous booty poppin' potatoes.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Freedia heads back to Los Angeles to attend the Grammy Awards, but the temptation of weed affects her every step and threatens her ability to stay out of jail.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Freedia lives it up in LA; Berto mixes things up with the dancers in New Orleans; Tootie snaps when she hears Freedia is bonding with the new dancers deep in the swamps of Louisiana.

programme.title: Diddy: Monster's Fall
programme.desc: A look into the downfall of the disgraced hip-hop mogul, Sean "Diddy" Combs, who could no longer buy his way out of trouble, when a grand jury indicted Combs on a racketeering conspiracy. It included sex trafficking, forced labor and bribery.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Manson Murders
programme.desc: A dive into the murders committed by the Manson Family in July and August of 1969, including the brutal killing of Sharon Tate.

programme.title: That White People S...
programme.desc: King Keraun tours a tiny house, kayaks and visits a bug farm because some people put the mental in environmental.

programme.title: That White People S...
programme.desc: King Keraun is learning how to kite surf, ride a jetpack and burn rubber with a professional stunt car driver.

programme.title: That White People S...
programme.desc: Keraun learns how the sausage is made when he gets buzzed with a beekeeper, yolked with an ostrich farmer, and udderly too close to a goat.

programme.title: Curvy Girls
programme.desc: Denise dates Ivory's brother, but is shocked by a surprise announcement by her ex; Ivory tries online dating; Lorna receives some devastating news.

programme.title: Curvy Girls
programme.desc: Ivory, Lorna and Rosie compete for the same nude editorial shoot; the girls decide to give speed dating a try.

programme.title: Curvy Girls
programme.desc: Lorna tries to ignore Ivory's curt criticism and lands a hot runway show; Denise fizzles at a video audition; a family emergency upsets plans.

programme.title: Curvy Girls
programme.desc: Denise struggles to balance her commitment to acting and her family; Lorna confronts her sugar daddy's demands; Ivory checks out her options for starting a family.

programme.title: Taking Care
programme.desc: Soon after Lauren Miller and Seth Rogen begin dating in 2004, Lauren's mother, Adele is diagnosed with early-onset Alzheimer's; through intimate interviews, "Taking Care" sheds warmth on Alzheimer's through comedy, medical insights, and abiding love.

programme.title: Reggie Yates Outside Man
programme.desc: Reggie spends a week in South Africa's largest white squatter camp, Coronation Park.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: This Is Not Financial Advice
programme.desc: Glauber Contessoto gambles his life savings on a joke cryptocurrency. Two months later, he becomes the Dogecoin Millionaire and an internet legend. While it might seem easy to get rich online, it's even easier to lose it all.

programme.title: Tehranto
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a painter and a young medical student as they argue over what it means to be Iranian in Canada.

programme.title: David Bowie: Out of This World
programme.desc: Few artists marked the 20th century like David Bowie marked it. He was an astonishing and eclectic performer whose work brought a new dimension to the music scene and queer culture. Driven, fierce and always wanting to escape conformity, he was an outsider and was considered as a man from another planet.

programme.title: Cher: Life in the Spotlight
programme.desc: Tracing Cher's life from her childhood stage fright to her rise as an iconic star in music, TV and movies.

programme.title: The Sex Clinic
programme.sub-title: Lumps, Premature Ejaculation and a Dry Vagina
programme.desc: Marco finds a lump on his penis; Harriette gets her dry vagina examined; Iffy seeks help for ongoing issues with premature ejaculation.

programme.title: The Sex Clinic
programme.desc: Taps has ejaculation issues; Tracy's concerned she might be a sex addict; Tom needs an STI test; Jordan has a lump on his bum.

programme.title: The Sex Clinic
programme.sub-title: STIs, Sex Advice and the Perfect Vagina
programme.desc: Hugo, who rarely uses condoms, comes in for an STI test; Lonan, who's a virgin, wants advice ahead of his "first time"; Esther wants the perfect vagina; Chelsie needs a new contraceptive implant fitted inside her arm.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Roots of the Man
programme.desc: The life of Jamaican Robert Nesta Marley, known around the globe as reggae musician Bob Marley.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Lily agrees to go on a date with a handsome older man, but things turn sour when he gets high; Che is vacationing in Mexico and picks up a Norwegian hottie, but he gets caught by her husband and seized by the Mexican police.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: When Phelisha agrees to date a white co-worker, she's shocked to see him dressed up as 50 Cent; Cory scores with a MILF, but leaves a treasured family heirloom at her house and must retrieve it the only way he knows how -- in disguise.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Amara La Negra and her mother, Ana Maria, get down in Miami to cook up some Dominican mangu; this staple from the DR comes with stories from Amara's childhood when she flourished at an early age with the help and sacrifice from her mom.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Kyle and his partner, Jada, reminisce about their high school romance that blossomed into a full-fledged life they share as artists and partners; together, they cook up tamales.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Eva Longoria and her best friend, Lucky, rehash a friendship that began in college and lasted the test of time; they cook Texican chalupas and sip tequila while reminiscing.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Freedia lives it up in LA; Berto mixes things up with the dancers in New Orleans; Tootie snaps when she hears Freedia is bonding with the new dancers deep in the swamps of Louisiana.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: It's Mardi Gras in New Orleans and Freedia has finally earned a coveted spot in the main parade, but a visit by a mysterious voodoo priest unsettles her as she hears shocking predictions about her future.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Freedia records a song for a local accident attorney that goes viral; rumors of Devon cheating turn Freedia's personal life upside down.

programme.title: Diana Ross: Supreme Sensation
programme.desc: From being the queen of Motown to taking on the world stage, Diana Ross has sold over 100 million records worldwide; her career spans decades, attracting generation after generation of loyal fans.

programme.title: The Myth of Marilyn Monroe
programme.desc: A look at Marilyn Monroe as a defining icon of 1950s America and how, throughout the decade, the myth of Marilyn and the American dream seemed to crumble.

programme.title: Dolly Parton: Big Hair, Bigger Heart
programme.desc: From humble roots to icon status, Dolly Parton has built a rich legacy in music and beyond. This is her story.

programme.title: That White People S...
programme.desc: Keraun hooks up with DIYers to learn how to crochet with a designer, make beer with a brewmaster and treasure hunt with an upcycler.

programme.title: That White People S...
programme.desc: King Keraun is on a quest to understand the unconditional love white people have for their animals when he visits an alpaca farm, gets messy with creative pet grooming, and tries taxidermy.

programme.title: That White People S...
programme.desc: King Keraun is on a quest to understand why white people love making things and tries his hand at chainsaw carving, welding and glassblowing.

programme.title: Curvy Girls
programme.desc: Lorna tries to ignore Ivory's curt criticism and lands a hot runway show; Denise fizzles at a video audition; a family emergency upsets plans.

programme.title: Curvy Girls
programme.desc: Denise struggles to balance her commitment to acting and her family; Lorna confronts her sugar daddy's demands; Ivory checks out her options for starting a family.

programme.title: The Luau
programme.desc: A man who owes a large sum of cash throws a party that soon spirals out of control just to raise some money.

programme.title: Malibooty
programme.desc: Three buddies (Brian Hooks, Sticky Fingaz, J.T. Jackson) leave their Arizona town and head to California for a wild beach party.

programme.title: Michael Jackson: Chase the Truth
programme.desc: Close friends, former staff and researchers paint an intimate portrait of pop star Michael Jackson's complicated world and put allegations of sexual abuse under the microscope.

programme.title: Tupac & Biggie: Worlds Collide
programme.desc: Presenting the stories of rappers and rivals Tupac Shakur and Biggie Smalls.

programme.title: Snoop Dogg: Uncaged
programme.desc: The story and legacy of Snoop Dogg; from the 1990s hip-hop scene to his status as a pop culture icon.

programme.desc: A look into the downfall of the disgraced hip-hop mogul, Sean "Diddy" Combs, who could no longer buy his way out of trouble, when a grand jury indicted Combs on a racketeering conspiracy. It included sex trafficking, forced labor and bribery.

programme.title: Sex Sells
programme.desc: OnlyFans top earner Lena the Plug invites Weezy to cameo in her first porn; the team at Evil Angel teaches Weezy the fundamentals of directing some of their most iconic scenes.

programme.title: Sex Sells
programme.desc: Weezy and rapper Freddie Gibbs stretch more than their imaginations when Jet Setting Jasmine drops by to explore their kinks; Weezy and her mom learn how to cowgirl while strengthening their pelvic floor with sex therapist Tyomi Morgan.
